Hey FanaFana  We started talking he asked me to be his girlfriend I agreed we started dating I told him I was scared to fall in love wit him becuz he might break my heart he told he would never and I was so foolish to believe him we then met after church at his building we hugged for the first time when I went home and slept I couldn't stop thinking about that one hug I even dreamt about it happening again days went by we became used to each other he fell deeply in love wit me same thing wit me we would stay late at night chatting most of the times he would get tired and I wouldn't want him to sleep I would beg him and ofc he used to agree days went by we created more and more memories he became the reason why I would wake up smiling in the morning till that one day came a day I wish to never see again a day I regretted giving my heart to him it all started on valentine everything was OK but me I was not in the mood on that day he asked me but I told him I was fine I gave him attitude and he got mad at me I went home without saying goodbye he got so pissed that on Monday tht we met at school he didn't even want to look at me for a minute it was like I was some stranger I felt hurt becuz ik he would never want to see me in pain but he left me there looking helpless on that day I did not know the worst is still going to come Wednesday comes the day my pain started he told me that he was mad at me after ignoring me for 2 days he told his friends that he wanted to break up wit me one of his friends told me I didn't want to believe it cuz I knew he doesn't like seeing me hurt but I was wrong I even told him wat his friend told me and he confirmed it he broke up wit me just like that he didn't even look like he felt sorry for wat he did he was so chilled when speaking on that day and that moment I felt like my whole world moved I went to class and I started crying I couldn't even forcus I was shocked that the same guy that was obsessed wit me left me on the spot tears kept falling I had so many questions but no could answer them for me and that's were my sorrow started I thought I was gonna be ok but I was totally wrong things started getting worse in April I couldn't stop thinking about what he did to me till today am still shocked that he did wat he did he told me he was gonna come back for me idk if I should keep waiting he doesn't even talk to me anymore he just stares at me from a distance sometimes I just feel like he was pressured to leave me but anyways I miss him so much he voice and love he really did cause a big damage to my heart I still love him regardless .
